message:
Add schema v11: analytics tables, rollup aggregator, and rebuild pipeline

Database schema (MIGRATION_V11):
- message_metrics fact table for per-message analytics with dimensions
  (agent_slug, workspace_id, source_id, role) and metrics (content chars,
  tokens, API usage, tool calls, plan flags). 6 indexes for fast
  analytical queries by hour, day, agent, workspace, source.
- usage_hourly rollup table for 1-hour granularity time-series queries
  with aggregated message/token/API counts. 3 indexes.
- usage_daily rollup table mirroring hourly schema at day granularity
  to avoid summing 24 hourly rows. 3 indexes.
- Bump CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION and SCHEMA_VERSION from 10 to 11

Analytics aggregator infrastructure:
- UsageRollupDelta struct tracking 14 metrics fields for rollup deltas
- MessageMetricsEntry struct with 19 fields for per-message analytics rows
- AnalyticsRollupAggregator with HashMap-based hourly/daily accumulators
  and record() method batching message contributions to both time scales
- has_plan_heuristic() cheap text detection for structured plan messages
- hour_id_from_millis() / millis_from_hour_id() time bucket conversions

Rebuild pipeline:
- rebuild_analytics() scans all messages in CHUNK_SIZE=10000 batches,
  extracts token metrics, populates message_metrics + rollups in a
  single transaction
- insert_message_metrics_batched_in_tx() with BATCH_SIZE=35 per INSERT
- flush_analytics_rollups_in_tx() with UPSERT semantics for idempotent
  rollup population
- AnalyticsRebuildResult with message/hourly/daily entry counts + duration

Comprehensive test coverage:
- migration_v11_creates_analytics_tables: Verify table/index creation
- migration_v11_from_v10: Verify upgrade path from schema v10
- analytics_ingest_populates_metrics_and_rollups: End-to-end ingest test
- has_plan_heuristic_detects_plans: Plan detection edge cases
- hour_id_round_trip: Time bucket conversion accuracy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
